Implemented COM_FileBase short-basename fallback parity and tests
Implemented COM_ParseEx overflow behavior parity and tests
Implemented Q_rint angle quantization parity and tests
Implemented COM_AddExtension extension-identity comparison parity and tests
Implemented case-sensitive COM_CheckParmNext parity and tests
Implemented internal/image export parity for 24/32bpp and upsidedown semantics; tests and yg validate pass.
Implemented cmdsys cvar query default annotations with tests
Implemented apropos-style unknown-command fallback in local execution with tests
Adjusted mount ordering so ironwail.pak is inserted after id1/pak0; added regression coverage.
Implemented COM_LoadPackFile parity guards in loadPack and added malformed-pack regression tests.
Changed pak discovery to contiguous pakN probing and stop-at-gap semantics; added regression test.
Implemented Quake64 lightmap parity: packed 16-bit to RGB decode and face LightOfs halving in raw/tree loaders with targeted tests.
Implemented BSP2/raw struct-size parity fixes for nodes/leafs/models plus tests covering parsed firstface/numfaces and marksurface offsets.
Implemented game-dir draw reload parity via host callback + startup wiring; updated graph artifacts; validated with yg validate and targeted draw tests.
Fixed LoadMDL section order/grouped-frame parsing and added regression coverage.
Implemented C/Ironwail grouped-skin cadence parity and updated tests.
Implemented ROM setter APIs with parity tests and graph updates
Aligned Set unknown-var behavior to C and added explicit Create user-defined path
Controller bookkeeping now keys replacement/removal by SDL JoystickID and cleans per-device trigger/gyro/repeat state; added unit tests.
Added held gamepad button/trigger repeat generation with C-like delay/rate and tests covering repeat lifecycle and cleanup.
Implemented C-parity START/BACK semantics in SDL3 backend and runtime routing; added coverage for console/menu/gameplay behavior.
Wired snd_waterfx scaling into underwater filter intensity path and added coverage for off/default/boost behavior.
Implemented audio cvar runtime parity: applied bgm/ambient/mixahead/speed/waterfx/extmusic controls with tests and Ygg updates.
Implemented: ExecuteProgram/callFunction now treat function index 0 as NULL function.
Implemented: vectoangles now matches C vertical-vector and pitch semantics; tests updated.
Implemented: LoadProgs now computes file CRC, validates header CRC and lump bounds, and DEF_SAVEGLOBAL field defs.
Implemented: chr2str now variadic and concatenates all args with C-style fallback character handling.
Implemented: min/max builtins now variadic via ArgC with compatibility fallback.
Implemented: SetEngineString/GetString semantics aligned to C knownstring model (static offsets + negative known slots).
Implemented: LoadProgs now binds GlobalVars typed view to live globals memory and tests cover binding.
Implemented: str2chr now supports negative indexing from end like C.
Implemented: OP_ADDRESS world-entity error now gated by server active state parity callback.
Implemented: etos now returns "entity %i" output format with updated tests.
Updated svc_fog wire decoding to C short/100 format and preserved fade behavior; updated fog parser tests.
Added signon gating for BaseMove/AccumulateCmd and remote client frame accumulation; added tests for pre-signon zero movement behavior.
Implemented svc_bf parity by triggering client BonusFlash directly during parse dispatch; added parser regression test.
Implemented stronger disconnect teardown on svc_disconnect via ClearState+disconnect transition, aligning reconnect/disconnect runtime reset semantics; added parser teardown test.
Aligned beam roll RNG with C global rand side effects by reseeding/consuming shared compatrand stream in temp-entity beam update; added side-effect test.
Centralized staged signon side-effect command generation in client runtime and wired remote signon send path to it, preserving name/color/spawn/begin behavior.
Added CL_Record_f-style safety guard rejecting demo recording filenames containing '..'; added regression test.
Added StopPlaybackWithSummary/PrintTimeDemoSummary and routed EOF, stopdemo, rewind-error, and disconnect teardown through summary-capable stop paths.
Implemented record command forms record <demo> [map [cdtrack]] and re-record stop behavior.
Implemented map no-arg query/help path and .bsp basename normalization in host and server spawn path.
Implemented explicit 0/1 semantics and usage arity behavior for god/noclip/fly/notarget.
Implemented timedemo maxfps bypass and disconnected vid_refreshrate fallback in GetFrameInterval.
Implemented Host_Pause parity for demo toggle path, pausable gating, and server paused state toggling output.
Aligned Host_AdvanceTime clamp branch with C semantics and aligned playerinfo wire row layout to C long/int encoding.
Dedicated loop now paces by sys_ticrate with C-style default fallback.
Implemented C discovery contract with QUAKE token/protocol request and protocol validation on reply path.
Completed: particle nil-RNG paths now use shared compatrand stream instead of fixed-seed local RNG; added regression coverage.
Completed: added gl_texturemode/gl_lodbias/gl_texture_anisotropy cvars and applied them in OpenGL world texture upload/filter selection; added tests.
Completed: added r_nolerp_list cvar and wired alias interpolation to apply ModNoLerp from list in OpenGL and GoGPU paths; added tests.
Added multiplayer net/lan/game-options flow parity states.
Expanded keys menu bindings and dedicated MenuKeys flow parity.
Added single-player maps entry and increased save slots to 20.
Implemented broad menu_* host command wiring and tests.

Implemented server-parity client spawn handshake and related tests.
Implemented server-parity drop/disconnect behavior.
Implemented server-parity client-command QC fallback handling.
Implemented server-parity reliable datagram fanout and serverflags sync.
Implemented server-parity checkbottom QC-to-Go sync.
Implemented mission-pack active-weapon network encoding parity.
Implemented per-entity signon reservation during map bootstrap.

Implemented command/cvar argument completion hooks and wired console provider dispatch.
Added word-boundary wrapping in console print path before overflow.
First-tab now prints list and inserts common prefix when multiple matches exist.
Implemented cursor-aware console editing, delete/insert, ctrl-word movement/deletion, and history restore semantics.
Added LogCenterPrint/con_logcenterprint behavior and hooked centerprint-family parser paths.
Implemented developer>=2 DPrintf2 tier.
Implemented columnar completion list formatting with con_maxcols support.
Console draw resize now subtracts left/right margins from line width.
QuakeBar now omits trailing newline when bar width equals console line width.
